what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment metadata record that registers an image asset against the design-source channel, storing an identifier, attachment type, target URI, and creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: Target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to a pitch-deck asset p-03
conventions: Follows a YAML frontmatter metadata schema for channel attachments
References external media via a structured URI
Records an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset
concerns: No author or provenance field beyond the timestamp
No alt text, caption, or content description for the image
Target asset existence and versioning are not verifiable from this file alone
notes: A timestamped image attachment record linking a pitch-deck asset to the design-source channel.
questions: What visual content does p-03 contain?
Is image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-03 a canonical or versioned asset?
Are there other attachments for the same pitch-deck slide?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — the file has no explicit stated purpose field; it functions as an attachment metadata record.
apparent_themes: Immutable timestamped references to external media
intention_signals: It appears intended to catalog and timestamp an image attachment for a pitch-deck asset within the design-source channel, making the asset discoverable via the channel-memory ledger.
novelty: The use of an image:// URI scheme to target a channel-local pitch-deck asset and the attachment_type taxonomy for non-code artifacts.
contribution: It contributes a channel-scoped, timestamped pointer to an image asset, preserving the relationship between the design-source channel and pitch-deck slide p-03.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel-memory attachment metadata record (att-6b726e37) in the design-source channel that references image asset image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-03 and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was intended to catalog and timestamp an image attachment for a pitch-deck asset in the design-source channel.
